phrases.intent_en: Ask where the credential verification desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de verificación de credenciales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh veh-ree-fee-kah-SYOHN deh kreh-dehn-SYAH-lehs?

likely_response.local: Segunda ventana, al fondo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOON-dah behn-TAH-nah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, second window on the left.

responses.english: At the back, second window on the left.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOON-dah behn-TAH-nah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Segunda ventana, al fondo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if group certificates are available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay certificados Compostela para grupos disponibles ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, eye ser-tee-fee-KAH-dohs kom-poh-STEH-lah PAH-rah groo-pohs dee-poh-nee-BLEHS ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is availability for groups now.

responses.english: Yes, there is availability for groups now.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to queue for distance certificate
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hago fila para el certificado de distancia?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh AH-goh FEE-lah PAH-rah el ser-tee-fee-KAH-doh deh dees-TAHN-syah?

likely_response.local: Fila número tres, justo detrás de usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-lah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS HOO-stoh DEHTRÁS DEH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: Queue number three, right behind you.

responses.english: Queue number three, right behind you.
responses.phonetic: FEE-lah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS HOO-stoh DEHTRÁS DEH oo-STEHD
responses.local: Fila número tres, justo detrás de usted.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to request priority for elderly pilgrim
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo solicito prioridad para un peregrino mayor?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh soh-lee-SEE-toh pree-oh-ree-DAHD pah-rah oon peh-reh-GREE-noh mah-YOHR?

likely_response.local: Informe al personal de seguridad para acceso prioritario inmediato.
likely_response.pronunciation: een-FOHR-meh AHL pehr-soh-NAHL DEH seh-g-ree-DAHD PAH-rah ahth-THEH-soh pree-oh-ree-tah-REE-oh een-meh-dee-AH-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Inform security staff for immediate priority access.

responses.english: Inform security staff for immediate priority access.
responses.phonetic: een-FOHR-meh AHL pehr-soh-NAHL DEH seh-g-ree-DAHD PAH-rah ahth-THEH-soh pree-oh-ree-tah-REE-oh een-meh-dee-AH-toh
responses.local: Informe al personal de seguridad para acceso prioritario inmediato.
